topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-10: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the clearest on-site opportunity: strong GSC signals show the codes page already ranks and gets significant impressions, while the low CTR queries suggest a query-page fit issue rather than a need for new content. It matches an existing cornerstone guide and a known backlog history, so human review should focus on first-screen usefulness and intent alignment without crossing canonical claim boundaries. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Better query match for players searching for Gift Center, redeem codes, and UID help, which can improve findability and reduce confusion on an already important page.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium to high because the query intent may already be served by another canonical page and any rewrite could blur cluster role separation.
claims_to_verify: Whether the query intent is best served by codes.html or another canonical page
Whether any page-level changes can be made without altering protected canonical claims
Whether the improvement stays within approved cornerstone scope
topics.next_step: Have the owner review whether the page can be improved within current scope while preserving canonical claims and cluster separation.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 33220 impressions, 586 clicks, 1.76% CTR, avg position 6.11.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3075 impressions, 113 clicks, 3.67% CTR, position 6.83.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 943 impressions, 43 clicks, 4.56% CTR, position 5.41.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 555 impressions, 23 clicks, 4.14% CTR, position 6.37.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 479 impressions, 22 clicks, 4.59% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

However, the external source is only a discovery signal, so the claims need independent verification before any content work is considered.
